description_long: This is a futuristic, science fiction-inspired airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a distinctive black and orange color scheme. The aircraft features four elongated wings arranged in an X-formation, each equipped with cylindrical engine nacelles and blaster-like extensions at the tips. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed with a transparent canopy, providing visibility for a single pilot. The rear of the airplane displays dual engine exhausts and a streamlined tail section without a traditional vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is minimal, with a single strut visible beneath the nose. The overall design suggests high maneuverability and advanced technology, reminiscent of iconic starfighters from popular media.
description: A sleek, black and orange sci-fi airplane with an X-shaped wing configuration, dual engines, and a single enclosed cockpit. The design is angular and futuristic, with blaster-like wing tips and minimal landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, central cockpit, and the X-shaped wing arrangement with visible engine nacelles and blaster tips.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, the placement of the engines on the wings, and the minimal nose landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual engine exhausts, the angular tail section, and the full span of the wings.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the cockpit canopy, the engine nacelles, and the overall streamlined shape.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing X-configuration with straight wings and blaster-like extensions at the tips; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer integrated into the fuselage and no separate horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle configuration with a single visible nose gear strut; main gear not clearly visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a transparent canopy.
